subcodes.first_line: O Bahram, celestial sphere of the Lord's tender care, the dawn of hope hath broken and the world-illumining Sun of the Concourse on high [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بهرام سپهر مهر پروردگار سپیده امید دمید و خورشید جهانتاب انجمن بالا
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @imagery in the Qur'an, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @education of children; moral education
